title: tragia parvifolia
intro: Tragia parvifolia, also known as Small Burr Bush, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Tragia parvifolia is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
